hero.subheadline: You're claiming a weekend. 65 private acres and a wedding your guests will never forget.

text: A weekend that unfolds naturally, not a wedding that ends before it really begins.
Open air and rustling poplars, not a ballroom ceiling and a strict schedule.
A celebration that reflects your story, not a template you're expected to fit into.
Music and dancing under the open sky, not the same indoor routine you've seen a hundred times.
The freedom to be themselves, whether that's creating a DIY celebration or an extravagant event that reflects their unique story.
A venue that feels like a getaway, not a place where you’re watching the clock all day.

packages.name: The Full 5-Day Experience
packages.subtitle: The complete experience
packages.description: 5-day celebration (Wed-Sun or Thu-Mon) with immersive guest time.
packages.previewDescription: Extended midweek-to-weekend access with full property amenities, cabin + camping, décor collection, and space for multiple events.

timeline.desc: Arrival day. People trickle in. Camp setup. First dinner together. Early bedtime.
The "settling in" day. Morning hike. Afternoon games. Evening bonfire. Walls start coming down.
Pre-wedding festivities. Rehearsal dinner. The anticipation builds.
YOUR DAY. Ceremony at golden hour, reception under stars.
The goodbye. But softer. Extended. "We should do this every year" becomes a real plan.

packages.perfectForText: Couples who want families to actually bond. Anyone who's left a 6-hour wedding thinking "I barely talked to anyone." Those who understand that the best celebrations unfold naturally, not on a tight schedule.

packages.name: The Classic 3-Day Weekend
packages.subtitle: Weekend wedding
packages.description: 3-day Friday-to-Sunday wedding weekend with exclusive access.
packages.previewDescription: Weekend access Fri–Sun with ceremony + reception areas, cabin stay, décor collection, and room for camping guests.

timeline.desc: Gates open. Your people arrive throughout the day. Tents up, gear settled, the weekend officially begins.
Exploration, campfires, the first wave of reconnection
Your wedding day, dawn to starlight
Slow morning, tearful goodbyes, promises to do this again

packages.perfectForText: Couples working with tighter schedules or budgets, or guests traveling from far away who need defined arrival/departure times. You still get that "wedding weekend" magic—exponentially more connection than a single-day event—in a contained timeframe.

packages.name: The Intimate 2-Day Escape
packages.subtitle: Intimate elopements
packages.description: 2-day weekday elopement experience with full property access.
packages.previewDescription: Full property access, ceremony + reception spaces, cabin suite, décor collection, and essentials for a simple weekday celebration.

timeline.desc: Arrive, settle in, rehearse if you wish. Evening bonfire under the stars.
Your wedding day—intimate, unhurried, exactly as you dreamed.

packages.perfectForText: Couples seeking an intimate elopement experience with just your closest people. All the magic of Rustic Retreat in a focused, meaningful two-day celebration.

capacity.title: Ceremony Space
capacity.description: Guests comfortably seated in natural forest ceremony area with towering Alberta pines as backdrop

capacity.title: Reception Area
capacity.description: Guests for dining and celebration under clear-top gazebo or open field arrangements

capacity.title: Overnight Stay
capacity.description: Guests can camp on the property—you choose where to set up, plus the cabin

footer.tagline: Your intimate 65-acre Alberta retreat where celebrations unfold naturally, just 50 minutes north of Edmonton.
footer.copyright: Rustic Retreat Weddings. All rights reserved.
